title: AN ACT TO CREATE CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA FE, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 503 / 55 OG No. 21, 3821 (May 25, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2144, April 24, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO CREATE CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA FE, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Barrio Pinamihagan to be composed of the present sitios of Pinamihagan, Pacol, Buyahon, Sugod, Pinaman-dayan, Pajo and Añgas; and

Barrio Busay to be composed of the present sitios of Busay, Hinologan, Buenavista, Nausa, Tipocpoc, Ag-borot, Boyongboyoñgan and Mihason.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 24, 1959.
